
```{r}
library(terra)      # Raster handling
library(sf)         # Shapefile handling
library(dplyr)      # Data manipulation
library(lubridate)  # Date parsing
### for easy data wrangling and plotting:   
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
### for easy relative file paths:
library(here)   
```
```{r}
tif_folder <- here("D:\\Sentinel-2_Harmonized_Indices\\")
shapefile_path <- here('data\\BigBreak_s.shp')
date_pattern <- "\\d{8}"
  
  # Read shapefile
  shp <- st_read(shapefile_path, quiet = TRUE)
  
  # List all .tif files
  tif_files <- list.files(tif_folder, pattern = "\\S2B.*\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)
  length(tif_files)
  results_list <- list()
  
  for (file in tif_files) {
    # Read raster
    rast_obj <- rast(file)
    
    # Get band names (or fallback)
    band_names <- names(rast_obj)
    
    # Extract mean values for first 10 bands
    mean_vals <- terra::extract(rast_obj[[1:10]], shp, fun = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # Remove ID column
    mean_vals <- mean_vals %>% select(-ID)
    
    # Rename columns to band names
    colnames(mean_vals) <- band_names[1:10]
    
    # Extract date from filename
    date_str <- regmatches(basename(file), regexpr(date_pattern, basename(file)))
        
    # Convert to Date
    date_val <- as.Date(date_str, format = "%Y%m%d")
    
    # Add date, Julian day, and filename
    mean_vals <- mean_vals %>%
      mutate(Date = date_val,
             Julian = yday(date_val),
             File = basename(file))
  
    results_list[[length(results_list) + 1]] <- mean_vals
  }
  #
  
  # Combine all results
  final_df <- bind_rows(results_list)
  final_df
```

```{r}
#make plots
  # Reshape to long format for ggplot
  df_long <- final_df %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = !c(Date, Julian, File),
      names_to = "Band",
      values_to = "MeanValue"
    )
  
  # Plot each band separately
  p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Date, y = MeanValue)) +
    geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
    geom_point(size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
    facet_wrap(~ Band, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    labs(
      title = "Time Series of Mean Index Values",
      x = "Date",
      y = "Mean Value"
    )
p
ggsave("mean_index_time_series.png", plot = p, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#Julian plot
# Function to plot summary by Julian date
  df_long2 <- final_df %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = !c(Date, Julian, File),
      names_to = "Band",
      values_to = "MeanValue"
    ) %>%
    group_by(Band, Julian) %>%
    summarise(MeanValue = mean(MeanValue, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  
  p2 <- ggplot(df_long2, aes(x = Julian, y = MeanValue, color = Band)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    labs(
      title = "Seasonal Summary by Julian Date",
      x = "Julian Day",
      y = "Mean Value",
      color = "Band"
    )
p2
ggsave("seasonal_summary_julian_plot.png", plot = p2, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
